jsonLd.title: Senior Plant Manager at Nocil
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Plant Manager looking for your next big career move? Nocil in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Nocil:
Nocil is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in GD&T
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nocil!
